text.title: Methodology Contribution Flow (Open Authorship) Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Methodology Contribution Flow (Open Authorship) output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: review by single reviewer for any methodology

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: pr_template_path populated with a typed value
review_rubric populated with a typed value
attribution_policy populated with a typed value
revenue_share_policy populated with a typed value
cla_url populated with a typed value
decay_review_cycle_months populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
